hooks.prompt: A git commit just ran in this repo. Read .claude/skills/changelog/SKILL.md and apply its rules to log this commit into CHANGELOG.md at the repo root. Use `git log -1 --pretty=%s` and `git show --stat HEAD` to inspect the commit. Skip logging entirely if the commit is a pure dependency/lockfile bump, formatting/lint-only change, or other change with no user-visible effect, per the skill's exclusion rules. Hook input: $ARGUMENTS
